examples: It is redder than the feet of the doves who inhabit the temples and are fed by the priests.
Trees such as maples usually get much redder the more north you travel in the northern hemisphere.
The pomegranate flowers that blossom in the gardens of Tyre are redder than roses which are not so red.
The further inland you go, the redder the sand gets: white to orange to insane red.
They looked filled with varying concentrations of apple juice, one redder than the next.
